programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: When a former student visits, Elizabeth thinks she may need her help. Meanwhile, Lucas orders something for all of Hope Valley to enjoy -- if they can get it to work.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Richest Man in Walnut Grove
programme.desc: When a company that owes money to Charles becomes bankrupt, Charlies ends up deep in debt and puts a lot of financial strain on the family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary's failing eyes end up causing issues with her schoolwork; when Charles gets her glasses, her class begins to tease her for them.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as recreation directors to help an angel on a difficult assignment in a retirement community.

programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson complicates the Ingallses' long-awaited camping vacation by deciding that she and her family should go along.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: A single woman with a new, out of control German shepherd turns to a handsome dog trainer for help. As they make progress with the dog, she realizes she may be developing feelings for the trainer.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and grow closer.

programme.title: Fairfield Road
programme.desc: A man (Jesse Metcalfe) finds sanctuary in Cape Cod after losing his job and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Fit for a Prince
programme.desc: A promising seamstress designs dresses for a charity ball hoping to impress the royal guest, but the dresses -- and a possible romance -- seem destined for disaster.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.sub-title: What Is and What Should Never Be
programme.desc: Elizabeth encourages Gowen to seek forgiveness from Rosaleen to heal old wounds; Montague continues to raise suspicion.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Everyone helps Rosemary as the governor visits early; Nathan is called away to help with land trouble, only to find himself in unexpected danger and with surprising intel.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The town prepares for the governor's black-tie ball; while still reeling from the true intentions of Union City Holdings, Lucas decides to try to sway the governor to their side.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: One Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: With help from their best friends, a happy couple plan the perfect wedding at the same place where their romance began.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape for the big day. Things get complicated when sparks start to fly between herself and Nick, the fiancé of one of her new clients.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: After their wedding venue reserves the wrong date, Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: Hello, It's Me
programme.desc: A widow receives messages from her late husband, urging her to move on and heal with a new man in her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: With Elizabeth at his side, Election Day has the entire town supporting Lucas, hoping he will save Hope Valley; Rosemary and Lee discuss who should be their baby's godfather.

programme.desc: Elizabeth turns over a new leaf; Nathan returns home from an investigation, while Bill questions its outcome; Rosemary chases a scoop; Lucas makes a surprise announcement.

programme.desc: Elizabeth and Allie plan a birthday party for Nathan; Lee and Rosemary weigh business responsibilities against family time; Lucas settles into his role as governor.
